IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LA PAZ, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAER, DONALD CLYDE $55,623.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $55,623.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF STEVEN DE LA PAZ.
